purpose: Machine-readable handoff map from concept images to Blender/video-engine outputs and UE5 runtime usage.

route_types.concept_to_blender_to_ue_actor: Generate image concept, approve direction, create Blender source/FBX through video-engine or Blender MCP, import into UE5 actor/component.
route_types.concept_to_ue_material_or_vfx: Generate image reference, build material/Niagara/runtime VFX in UE5, validate in gameplay capture.
route_types.concept_to_ue_ui: Generate icon/card reference, crop/vectorize or redraw into UE UI assets, validate at gameplay HUD size.
route_types.audio_engine_to_ue: Generate audio through audio-engine, import WAV/MetaSound/SoundCue into UE5, validate against gameplay timing.
route_types.blender_existing_to_ue: Use existing Blender/FBX package as the candidate source, refine using concept references, then import into UE5.

assets.ue_runtime_target: ALightWarriorCharacter visual mesh and weapon attachment
assets.next_system_action: Generate concept PNG, approve silhouette, create Blender skeletal/static placeholder package, then import into the UE character Blueprint.
assets.acceptance_gate: Default camera shows face/body direction, white-gold/dawn-blue identity, and hammer silhouette during movement and combat.

assets.ue_runtime_target: AShadowEnemy fast variant mesh, attack tell, hit flash, and dissolve feedback
assets.current_runtime_fallback: C++ procedural enemy mesh with red-violet tell ring and gold death burst
assets.next_system_action: Generate concept PNG, make a simple readable Blender mesh, import it into the ShadowEnemy visual component.
assets.acceptance_gate: Distinct from hero at combat distance; attack tell is visible before damage.

assets.ue_runtime_target: Future heavy enemy actor or AShadowEnemy heavy variant
assets.current_runtime_fallback: Not yet implemented as a separate UE actor
assets.next_system_action: Generate concept PNG, model heavy silhouette in Blender, add heavy enemy class/variant with charge tell.
assets.acceptance_gate: Reads heavier and slower than the imp, with a clear red-violet charge tell.

assets.ue_runtime_target: ASacredCircle materials, expansion ring, danger boundary, restored territory pulse
assets.next_system_action: Use generated reference frames to tune UE material colors, opacity, expansion timing, and Niagara/material effects.
assets.acceptance_gate: Safety, danger, expansion, and restored territory read without hiding player or enemies.

assets.ue_runtime_target: ALightWarriorCharacter weapon attachment and Thunder Hammer impact effects
assets.current_runtime_fallback: Runtime hammer/ability effect represented by C++ pulses and shockwave rings
assets.next_system_action: Generate concept PNG, model a readable hammer in Blender, attach to character hand/socket, and drive impact VFX.
assets.acceptance_gate: Hammer head and lightning core read during movement and strike frames.

assets.ue_runtime_target: ALightWarriorGameMode bootstrapped floor, lanes, well placements, and restored seams
assets.current_runtime_fallback: C++ procedural huge flat world plane, path meshes, wells, and materials
assets.next_system_action: Use existing arena Blender package as the first model candidate, refine against concept references, then import pieces into UE5.
assets.acceptance_gate: Huge flat-world plane hides the edge, combat lanes remain readable, and restored seams show progress.

assets.ue_runtime_target: AThunderHammerTemple landmark mesh, activation core, and collision footprint
assets.next_system_action: Import existing FBX candidate, compare to internal image-gen temple reference, tune scale/collision/materials in UE5.
assets.acceptance_gate: Temple is the strongest landmark and the approach lane remains playable under pressure.

assets.ue_runtime_target: Future resource pickup actor for Light/Courage/Resonance rewards
assets.current_runtime_fallback: Resource gains are currently driven by combat and well events
assets.next_system_action: Generate concept PNG, create simple low-poly shard mesh/material, then spawn it as a pickup reward.
assets.acceptance_gate: Ground pickup glow reads without looking like enemy attack/VFX.

assets.ue_runtime_target: Corruption floor material, enemy danger tell accents, boundary pressure
assets.current_runtime_fallback: C++ runtime materials on procedural meshes
assets.next_system_action: Generate material reference, build UE material instance with violet-black base and restrained red-violet pulse.
assets.acceptance_gate: Signals danger without hiding silhouettes or circle boundaries.

assets.ue_runtime_target: Restored floor, light well, temple, and safe path material instances
assets.current_runtime_fallback: C++ runtime materials on procedural meshes
assets.next_system_action: Generate material reference, build UE material instance with pale stone, gold seams, and dawn-blue resonance.
assets.acceptance_gate: Feels safe/reclaimed while preserving combat readability.

assets.ue_runtime_target: ALightWarriorHUD iconography and future UMG widgets
assets.next_system_action: Generate icon sheet, select/crop/redraw icons, import UI textures or Slate brushes.
assets.acceptance_gate: Icons remain understandable at HUD size without text.

assets.next_system_action: Generate card visual reference, build UMG upgrade card layout using icon-first visuals.
assets.acceptance_gate: Light Strike, Sacred Circle, and Thunder Hammer upgrades are distinct without text dependency.

assets.next_system_action: Generate loop through audio-engine, import WAV into UE5, validate mix under combat SFX.
assets.acceptance_gate: Loops cleanly and does not mask core gameplay cues.

assets.ue_runtime_target: Dash, Light Strike, shadow dissolve, circle expansion, temple activation, hammer slam
assets.next_system_action: Generate SFX pack through audio-engine, import WAVs into UE5, attach to gameplay events.
assets.acceptance_gate: Strike, danger, defeat, and restoration cues are distinct and timed to gameplay.
